updateNote: Day 82 12:08 PM PDT — Israel kills 8 in Lebanon (Doueir 5, Tibnin 2, Burj Shemali 1); Lebanon toll 3,069. Senate advances war powers 50-47 (4 GOP defections — Collins, Murkowski, Paul, Cassidy). US boards Iranian tanker M/T Celestial Sea (5th boarding). Trump at CGA commencement: 'Do we finish it or sign a document?' Khamenei: war is 'Third Sacred Defense.' Ghalibaf: US 'seeking new war.' Oil plunges: Brent $110.34 (-2.3%), WTI $97.33 (-6.55%) on diplomatic optimism. Three supertankers exit Hormuz. Gas $4.555. Blockade Day 79.
